parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) as result FROM (
  WITH recent_7d AS (
    -- Семь последних дней: контрольная точка
    SELECT
      p.id as pid,
      COALESCE(p.ticker, p.slug) as sku,
      p.name, p.brand, p.is_active, p.stock_quantity,
      COUNT(*) as total_7d,
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.status LIKE 'cancelled%') as cancelled_7d,
      MAX(o.created_at)::date as last_attempt
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id
    JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
    WHERE o.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
      AND o.channel = 'web'
    GROUP BY p.id, p.ticker, p.slug, p.name, p.brand, p.is_active, p.stock_quantity
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 
       AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.status LIKE 'cancelled%')::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) >= 0.50
  ),
  prior_30d AS (
    -- Предыдущие 30 дней (без последних 7): эталон
    SELECT
      p.id as pid,
      COUNT(*) as total_prior,
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.status LIKE 'cancelled%') as cancelled_prior,
      COALESCE(
        ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.status LIKE 'cancelled%') / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1),
        0
      ) as prior_cancel_rate
    FROM order_items oi
    JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id
    JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
    WHERE o.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '37 days'
      AND o.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
      AND o.channel = 'web'
    GROUP BY p.id
  )
  SELECT 
    r.sku, r.name, r.brand, r.is_active, r.stock_quantity,
    r.total_7d, r.cancelled_7d,
    ROUND(100.0 * r.cancelled_7d / r.total_7d, 1) as cancel_rate_7d,
    COALESCE(p.total_prior, 0) as total_prior,
    COALESCE(p.cancel_rate_prior, 0) as cancel_rate_prior,
    r.last_attempt,
    -- Флаги "впервые"
    CASE 
      WHEN p.pid IS NULL THEN 'new_problem'  -- нет истории - новый товар
      WHEN p.cancel_rate_prior < 50 THEN 'newly_crossed_50'  -- раньше был < 50%, сейчас ≥ 50
      ELSE 'chronic'  -- и раньше был плохим
    END as status
  FROM recent_7d r
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT pid, total_prior, cancel_rate_prior
    FROM (SELECT *, prior_cancel_rate as cancel_rate_prior FROM prior_30d) pp
    WHERE pp.pid = r.pid
  ) p ON true
  WHERE r.is_active = true
  ORDER BY 
    CASE 
      WHEN p.pid IS NULL THEN 1
      WHEN p.cancel_rate_prior < 50 THEN 2
      ELSE 3
    END,
    r.total_7d DESC,
    r.cancelled_7d DESC
  LIMIT 40
) t
